property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\MiKTeX\miktex\bin\x64\;C:\Program Files\Graphviz\bin;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Users\edwin\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\MiKTeX\miktex\bin\x64\;C:\Program Files\Graphviz\bin;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Users\edwin\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;c:\Users\edwin\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;.

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
17:55:32.773 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.sistemaweb.sistemaweb.SistemawebApplicationTests]: SistemawebApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 17:55:33.283 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.sistemaweb.sistemaweb.SistemawebApplication for test class com.example.sistemaweb.sistemaweb.SistemawebApplicationTests 17:55:33.942 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
